title: coleus englerastrum
intro: Coleus englerastrum, also known as Mexican coleus or blood leaf, is a tropical plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Coleus englerastrum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Coleus englerastrum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by extracting the plant's essential oils using solvents like ethanol or glycerin.
